target: 5. Some Hopes
…M-Magic?

That's how it is.
You might be surprised, but make sure to sort out your feelings!
…'She' hasn't appeared yet.

I see…
I guess… I have to show them…

Sou, keep your cool.
…Ah, I get it.

Then, let's go.
…Here we go.
That's all.

That's crazy…
Is it really Tokiko?

What I just saw…
Was that really the truth?!

What was that last thing?!
My sister would never do something like that!
And… she's already become a Shadow…

You're lying!! 
It's some kind of mistake, right?!

Calm down, Sou.
It's just the previous loop.

Because I died, I went back over an hour.
That event hasn't happened yet.

I called Tokiko before coming here.
Maybe something changed.
Tokiko? Is she okay?!
That…
Shinpai!! Say you're okay!!
Sou…
"Ah, she's definitely okay."
"That's still unknown."

Ah, she's definitely okay.
No need to worry.

That's right!
Tokiko will be fine!
That's right… that's right!
Then why hasn't Hishigata Tokiko appeared yet?
That…

What does that mean?
Is Tokiko already too late?!
I never said anything like that.
I'm just raising a question based on objective facts.
Ku…!

That's still unknown.
I want to believe I'm okay too…
Damn it!!

Sou, you're okay!!
The voice on the phone was real Tokiko!

Even if the voice is identical,
if it's a Shadow, that's natural.
You should know that's not a comfort at all.
That's…

Excessive hope only accelerates disappointment.

If a Shadow appears,

Shadows aren't the same as the real thing.

…Ku.
Wait!

Maybe we can solve this without killing the Shadow!
Huh… What's your plan?

Ah, you said something about reversing the path Haine used to mess with his mind.
Using a similar method, maybe we can save Tokiko!
…Hmm, what's the basis?

Exactly!

…Alright.

That's right!

Yes, of course!

I'll leave it to you!

Yeah, let's do our best!

Alright!
